channel.title: Technology Education Collaborative
channel.description: Recent content on Technology Education Collaborative

item.title: About
item.description:
The Technology Education Collaborative fosters a robust Arizona tech community. We do this by providing virtual and in-person spaces to meet, learn, collaborate and advocate. Our articles, newsletters and events inform and educate both professional and aspiring technologists. We’re bringing Arizona technologists together to support the safe, secure future they work to create each and every day.

TEC believes in conversation, collaboration and people learning from each other. That’s why we offer local tech meetups a free Discord channel on our server. We’ll handle the setup, you bring the community. Even if you’re brand new to Discord, we can help you leverage this awesome platform to streamline meeting planning and keep the great conversation going. If you run a tech meetup and are tired of scrambling to find a venue, we offer members introductions to three fully-equipped venues to get together and talk tech.

item.title: ACSL Directions & Parking
item.description:
GateWay Community College - Washington Campus 108 N. 40th St. Phoenix, AZ 85034

The ACSL is located in Room 2108 of the MA building.

Park in lots 3 and 4 at Gateway Community College on 40th and Washington Street. The Advanced Cyber Systems Lab is located on the second floor of the MA building in room 2108. Go through the double glass doors and up the staircase to your immediate left. The room is the first door on the right in the hallway. The wall is bright orange so you can’t miss it. There is also a sign on the door with a number you can call for someone to come down and lead the way.

item.title: ACSL Podcast Booking
item.description:
For different viewing options (such as a daily/weekly/monthly view), you can visit the booking page here:

Check out TEC’s podcast series TEC Talks, now on Youtube.

item.title: Donate
item.description:
Help us put on more awesome tech events! Technology Education Collaborative (TEC) is an Arizona 501(c)3 and all contributions are tax deductible. Please donate by using the form below.

Thank you for supporting your local Arizona tech community!

If you have any questions about donations please contact us at contact@techedcollab.org.

item.title: Events
item.description:
Events hosted by or associated with TEC.

TEC Ham Radio Group: Learn to Program Your Radio!

By popular demand, our first meeting of the TEC Ham Radio Group is this month!

Andrew Cornwall will teach us all how to program our radios and get on the air.

All experience and license levels welcome! Feel free to drop in even if you’re just ham-radio-curious. You’ll get all your questions answered in a warm and welcoming environment.
